parameters.query:
SELECT
  cb.service_name,
  cb.state,
  cb.failure_count,
  cb.threshold,
  cb.cooldown_seconds,
  cb.last_failure_at,
  cb.opened_at,
  CASE
    WHEN cb.state = 'CLOSED' THEN TRUE
    WHEN cb.state = 'HALF_OPEN' THEN TRUE
    WHEN cb.state = 'OPEN' AND cb.opened_at IS NOT NULL
         AND NOW() > cb.opened_at + (cb.cooldown_seconds || ' seconds')::INTERVAL THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS is_callable
FROM pharmaos_circuit_breaker cb
WHERE cb.service_name = 'openrouter_llm';

WITH dlq_abandoned AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT (failed_payload->>'source_id') AS source_id
  FROM pharmaos_dead_letter_queue
  WHERE status = 'ABANDONED'
),
candidates AS (
  SELECT
    sm.*,

    -- ── TEMPORAL CALCULATIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0
      AS age_hours,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - sm.ingested_at)) / 3600.0
      AS ingest_age_hours,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - sm.mergeat)) / 3600.0
      AS merge_age_hours,

    -- ── VERSION / SCORING DRIFT ───────────────────────────────────────────
    GREATEST(COALESCE(sm.version, 1) - COALESCE(sm.scoring_version, 0), 0)
      AS version_lag,
    CASE
      WHEN sm.version > COALESCE(sm.scoring_version, 0) THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS needs_retriage,

    -- ── URGENCY WEIGHT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN sm.is_urgent IS TRUE
       AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 72
        THEN 1.0
      WHEN sm.is_urgent IS TRUE THEN 0.5
      ELSE 0.0
    END AS urgency_weight,

    -- ── AI TOKEN EFFICIENCY ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(sm.totaltokens, 0) > 0
        THEN ROUND((sm.completiontokens::numeric / sm.totaltokens::numeric) * 100, 2)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS completion_token_ratio,

    -- ── QUALITY COMPLETENESS SCORE ────────────────────────────────────────
    (
      CASE WHEN sm.drug_name        IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.indication       IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.sponsor          IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.phase            IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.moa              IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.modality         IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.geography        IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.asset_id         IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.nct_id           IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sm.recommended_action IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    ) AS field_completeness_score,

    -- ── AI READINESS FLAG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN sm.ai_processed IS TRUE
       AND sm.ai_summary   IS NOT NULL
       AND sm.modelused     IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'COMPLETE'
      WHEN sm.ai_processed IS TRUE
       AND (sm.ai_summary IS NULL OR sm.modelused IS NULL)
        THEN 'PARTIAL'
      WHEN sm.ai_processed IS FALSE OR sm.ai_processed IS NULL
        THEN 'PENDING'
      ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
    END AS ai_readiness,

    -- ── COMPOSITE SCORE (full weighted formula) ───────────────────────────
    LEAST(10.0,
      -- Domain weight
      CASE sm.signal_domain
        WHEN 'safety'     THEN 3.5
        WHEN 'regulatory' THEN 2.5
        WHEN 'ci'         THEN 2.0
        WHEN 'bd'         THEN 1.5
        ELSE 1.0
      END
      -- Urgency boost (time-decayed)
      + CASE
          WHEN sm.is_urgent IS TRUE
           AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 72
            THEN 2.5
          WHEN sm.is_urgent IS TRUE THEN 1.25
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      -- Override modifiers
      + CASE
          WHEN sm.override_status IN ('UPGRADE', 'REOPEN') THEN  2.0
          WHEN sm.override_status = 'DOWNGRADE'            THEN -2.0
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      -- Competitor intelligence bonus
      + CASE WHEN sm.competitor_flag IS TRUE THEN 1.5 ELSE 0.0 END
      -- Impact level bonus
      + CASE sm.impact_level
          WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1.5
          WHEN 'MED'  THEN 0.75
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      -- Quality score contribution (normalized 0–1)
      + LEAST(COALESCE(sm.quality_score, 0) / 10.0, 1.0)
      -- Version lag penalty/signal (staleness of scoring)
      + LEAST(GREATEST(COALESCE(sm.version, 1) - COALESCE(sm.scoring_version, 0), 0) * 0.25, 1.0)
      -- Recency bonus (seen in last 6h)
      + CASE
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 6
            THEN 0.5
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      -- AI severity bonus
      + CASE sm.safety_severity
          WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1.0
          WHEN 'HIGH'     THEN 0.5
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      -- Priority score contribution (normalized)
      + LEAST(COALESCE(sm.priority_score, 0) / 20.0, 0.5)
      -- Impact score contribution (normalized)
      + LEAST(COALESCE(sm.impact_score, 0) / 20.0, 0.5)
    ) AS composite_score,

    -- ── DOMAIN RANK (per-domain ordering for balancing) ───────────────────
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY sm.signal_domain
      ORDER BY
        sm.is_urgent          DESC NULLS LAST,
        sm.competitor_flag    DESC NULLS LAST,
        COALESCE(sm.quality_score, 0) DESC,
        sm.impact_score       DESC NULLS LAST,
        sm.last_seen_at       DESC NULLS LAST
    ) AS domain_rank,

    -- ── STALENESS TIER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 6    THEN 'FRESH'
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 24   THEN 'RECENT'
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 72   THEN 'AGING'
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 168  THEN 'STALE'
      ELSE 'EXPIRED'
    END AS staleness_tier,

    -- ── ROUTING RECOMMENDATION ────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN sm.is_urgent IS TRUE
        AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(sm.last_seen_at, sm.ingested_at))) / 3600.0 <= 72
        THEN 'ESCALATE_IMMEDIATE'
      WHEN sm.safety_severity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
        AND sm.signal_domain = 'safety'
        THEN 'ESCALATE_SAFETY'
      WHEN sm.competitor_flag IS TRUE
        AND sm.signal_domain IN ('ci', 'bd')
        THEN 'ROUTE_COMPETITIVE_INTEL'
      WHEN sm.version > COALESCE(sm.scoring_version, 0)
        THEN 'RETRIAGE_REQUIRED'
      WHEN sm.override_status IN ('UPGRADE', 'REOPEN')
        THEN 'OVERRIDE_REVIEW'
      WHEN sm.ai_processed IS FALSE OR sm.ai_processed IS NULL
        THEN 'QUEUE_AI_PROCESSING'
      WHEN sm.qualitydecision = 'INGEST'
        AND COALESCE(sm.quality_score, 0) >= 7
        THEN 'READY_FOR_DIGEST'
      ELSE 'MONITOR'
    END AS routing_recommendation,

    -- ── MERGE READINESS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    CASE
      WHEN sm.merge_status = 'READY'
       AND sm.duplicaterisk  NOT IN ('HIGH')
       AND sm.qualitydecision = 'INGEST'
        THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS merge_ready,

    -- ── DUPLICATE RISK SCORE (numeric) ────────────────────────────────────
    CASE sm.duplicaterisk
      WHEN 'HIGH'   THEN 3
      WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2
      WHEN 'LOW'    THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS dup_risk_score

  FROM signals_mesh sm
  LEFT JOIN dlq_abandoned dlq ON dlq.source_id = sm.source_id
  WHERE
    -- ── PROCESSING FILTER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    (
      sm.ai_processed IS FALSE
      OR sm.ai_processed IS NULL
      OR sm.version > COALESCE(sm.scoring_version, 0)
    )
    -- ── STATUS EXCLUSIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    AND COALESCE(sm.status, '') NOT IN (
      'TTL_EXPIRED', 'withdrawn', 'terminated', 'completed'
    )
    -- ── TTL GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    AND (sm.ttl_expires_at IS NULL OR sm.ttl_expires_at > NOW())
    -- ── INGESTION WINDOW (90 days) ────────────────────────────────────────
    AND sm.ingested_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
    -- ── DLQ EXCLUSION (abandoned signals) ────────────────────────────────
    AND dlq.source_id IS NULL
    -- ── MERGE STATUS FILTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    AND COALESCE(sm.merge_status, '') NOT IN ('REJECTED', 'DUPLICATE')
    -- ── REFUSAL FILTER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    AND sm.refusal IS NULL
),

balanced AS (
  SELECT * FROM candidates
  WHERE
    (signal_domain = 'safety'     AND domain_rank <= 20) OR
    (signal_domain = 'regulatory' AND domain_rank <= 15) OR
    (signal_domain = 'ci'         AND domain_rank <= 15) OR
    (signal_domain = 'bd'         AND domain_rank <= 10) OR
    (signal_domain NOT IN ('safety','regulatory','ci','bd') AND domain_rank <= 5)
)

SELECT DISTINCT ON (source_id)

  -- ── IDENTITY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  id,
  source_id,
  signal_domain,
  signal_type,
  source,
  title,
  summary,
  url,
  fingerprint,
  deduphash,

  -- ── DRUG / ASSET ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  drug_name,
  entity_name,
  asset_id,
  indication,
  sponsor,
  phase,
  status,
  moa,
  modality,
  nct_id,
  geography,

  -- ── RISK & SCORING ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  impact_level,
  impact_score,
  priority_score,
  quality_score,
  safety_severity,
  patient_impact_estimate,
  confidence,
  notif_priority,
  route_tier,

  -- ── FLAGS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  is_urgent,
  competitor_flag,
  ai_processed,
  strategymemoryused,

  -- ── OVERRIDE & GOVERNANCE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  override_status,
  override_by,
  override_reason,

  -- ── TRIAGE & QUALITY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  qualitydecision,
  qualityflags,
  contextquality,
  assetmatchmethod,
  matchmethod,
  duplicaterisk,
  merge_status,
  refusal,

  -- ── AI METADATA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ai_summary,
  ai_classification,
  recommended_action,
  modelused,
  modelroutingreason,
  temperatureused,
  prompttokens,
  completiontokens,
  totaltokens,

  -- ── PIPELINE METADATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  version,
  scoring_version,
  pipelineversion,
  triagehints,
  _triage_meta,

  -- ── TIMESTAMPS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ingested_at,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at,
  mergeat,

  -- ── SQL-COMPUTED FIELDS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  composite_score,
  domain_rank,
  age_hours,
  ingest_age_hours,
  merge_age_hours,
  version_lag,
  needs_retriage,
  urgency_weight,
  completion_token_ratio,
  field_completeness_score,
  ai_readiness,
  staleness_tier,
  routing_recommendation,
  merge_ready,
  dup_risk_score

FROM balanced
ORDER BY
  source_id,
  composite_score       DESC,
  is_urgent             DESC NULLS LAST,
  version_lag           DESC,
  age_hours             ASC,
  quality_score         DESC NULLS LAST,
  field_completeness_score DESC

LIMIT 60;
SELECT id, name, aliases, therapeutic_area, indication, phase, strategic_priority, competitive_set, moa_description, modality FROM pharmaos_assets;

SELECT id, decision_type, asset_id, question, decision_made, decision_rationale, outcome, tags, made_by, made_at FROM strategy_memory WHERE made_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY made_at DESC LIMIT 50;

UPDATE signals_mesh SET
  impact_level       = $1,
  impact_score       = $2,
  signal_type        = $3,
  ai_summary         = $4,
  competitor_flag    = $5,
  recommended_action = $6,
  score_breakdown    = $7::jsonb,
  ai_processed       = TRUE,
  ai_classification  = $8::jsonb,
  confidence         = $9,
  asset_id           = COALESCE($10, asset_id),
  priority_score     = $11,
  scoring_version    = GREATEST(COALESCE(scoring_version, 0) + 1, 2),
  version            = GREATEST(COALESCE(version, 0) + 1, 1),
  quality_score      = $12,
  fingerprint        = COALESCE($13, fingerprint),
  dedup_hash         = COALESCE($14, dedup_hash),
  last_seen_at       = NOW()
WHERE source_id = $15
  AND signal_domain = $16
RETURNING id, source_id, signal_domain, impact_level, impact_score;

INSERT INTO signal_lineage (signal_id, parent_signal_id, transformation_type, transformation_details, pipeline_stage)
SELECT sm.id, sm.parent_signal_id, 'enrichment',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'pipeline_version', '5.0.0',
    'model_used', $1,
    'impact_level', $2,
    'impact_score', $3,
    'asset_matched', $4,
    'strategy_memory_used', $5,
    'enriched_at', NOW()::text
  ),
  'wf2_ai_triage'
FROM signals_mesh sm
WHERE sm.source_id = $6 AND sm.signal_domain = $7
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO pharmaos_system_health (metric_name, metric_value, metric_unit, tags)
SELECT
  m->>'metric_name',
  (m->>'metric_value')::numeric,
  m->>'metric_unit',
  (m->'tags')::jsonb
FROM jsonb_array_elements($1::jsonb) AS m;

INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, domain, signal_id, actor, action, new_state, metadata, pipeline_version)
SELECT
  $1,
  $2,
  sm.id,
  'wf2_ai_triage',
  $3,
  $4::jsonb,
  $5::jsonb,
  2
FROM signals_mesh sm
WHERE sm.source_id = $6 AND sm.signal_domain = $2
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO compound_events (
  title,
  domains,
  trigger_pattern,
  compound_risk_score,
  escalation_level,
  ai_narrative
)
SELECT
  e->>'title',
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(e->'domains')),
  e->>'trigger_pattern',
  (e->>'compound_risk_score')::numeric,
  e->>'escalation_level',
  e->>'ai_narrative'
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ $json.compoundEventsJson }}'::jsonb) AS e
WHERE '{{ $json.compoundEventsJson }}' != '[]';
INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, domain, actor, action, metadata) VALUES ('DIGEST_QUEUED', $1, 'wf2', 'daily_digest_queue', $2::jsonb);
INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, domain, actor, action, metadata) VALUES ('DIGEST_QUEUED', $1, 'wf2', 'weekly_digest_queue', $2::jsonb);
INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, domain, actor, action, metadata) VALUES ('SIGNAL_ARCHIVED', $1, 'wf2', 'auto_dismiss', $2::jsonb);

INSERT INTO pharmaos_dead_letter_queue (source_workflow, source_node, failed_payload, error_message, status, next_retry_at)
VALUES ('PharmaOS_WF2', 'AI_Triage', $1::jsonb, $2, 'PENDING', NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes');

WITH enriched AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    signal_domain,
    signal_type,
    source_id,
    source,
    title,
    entity_name,
    asset_id,
    indication,
    drug_name,
    sponsor,
    phase,
    status,
    nct_id,
    impact_score,
    impact_level,
    priority_score,
    competitor_flag,
    is_urgent,
    confidence,
    quality_score,
    last_seen_at,
    first_seen_at,
    CASE
      WHEN asset_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(asset_id) <> '' THEN 'ASSET:' || asset_id
      WHEN drug_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(drug_name) <> '' THEN 'DRUG:' || LOWER(TRIM(drug_name))
      WHEN entity_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(entity_name) <> '' THEN 'ENTITY:' || LOWER(TRIM(entity_name))
      WHEN indication IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(indication) <> '' THEN 'IND:' || LOWER(TRIM(indication))
      ELSE 'DOMAIN:' || signal_domain
    END AS entity_key,
    CASE
      WHEN asset_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(asset_id) <> '' THEN 1
      WHEN drug_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(drug_name) <> '' THEN 2
      WHEN entity_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(entity_name) <> '' THEN 3
      WHEN indication IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(indication) <> '' THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS match_tier,
    (
      CASE WHEN asset_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(asset_id) <> '' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN drug_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(drug_name) <> '' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN indication IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(indication) <> '' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN entity_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(entity_name) <> '' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN sponsor IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(sponsor) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN nct_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN confidence = 'high' THEN 2 WHEN confidence = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN impact_score >= 7 THEN 2 WHEN impact_score >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN is_urgent = TRUE THEN 3 ELSE 0 END
    ) AS richness_score
  FROM signals_mesh
  WHERE last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    AND ai_processed = TRUE
),

triple_threat AS (
  SELECT
    entity_key,
    MIN(match_tier) AS best_match_tier,
    array_agg(DISTINCT signal_domain ORDER BY signal_domain) AS domains,
    COUNT(DISTINCT signal_domain) AS domain_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_signals,
    MAX(impact_score) AS peak_impact,
    ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_impact,
    SUM(richness_score) AS total_richness,
    MAX(last_seen_at) AS latest_signal_at,
    array_agg(DISTINCT drug_name) FILTER (WHERE drug_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(drug_name) <> '') AS drug_names,
    array_agg(DISTINCT asset_id) FILTER (WHERE asset_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(asset_id) <> '') AS asset_ids,
    array_agg(DISTINCT entity_name) FILTER (WHERE entity_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(entity_name) <> '') AS entity_names,
    array_agg(DISTINCT indication) FILTER (WHERE indication IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(indication) <> '') AS indications,
    CASE
      WHEN MIN(match_tier) = 1 THEN 'EXACT_ASSET'
      WHEN MIN(match_tier) = 2 THEN 'DRUG_NAME'
      WHEN MIN(match_tier) = 3 THEN 'ENTITY_NAME'
      WHEN MIN(match_tier) = 4 THEN 'INDICATION_CLUSTER'
      ELSE 'DOMAIN_ONLY'
    END AS match_confidence,
    'TRIPLE_THREAT' AS event_type
  FROM enriched
  GROUP BY entity_key
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT signal_domain) >= 3
),

recall_cascade AS (
  SELECT
    entity_key,
    COALESCE(
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(drug_name), '')),
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(entity_name), '')),
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(indication), '')),
      entity_key
    ) AS affected_entity,
    MIN(match_tier) AS best_match_tier,
    array_agg(DISTINCT signal_type ORDER BY signal_type) AS safety_types,
    COUNT(DISTINCT signal_type) AS safety_type_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_safety_signals,
    MAX(impact_score) AS peak_impact,
    MAX(last_seen_at) AS latest_signal_at,
    MIN(last_seen_at) AS earliest_signal_at,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(last_seen_at) - MIN(last_seen_at))) / 3600 AS cascade_hours,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT signal_type) >= 3 THEN 'CRITICAL'
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT signal_type) = 2 THEN 'HIGH'
      ELSE 'MODERATE'
    END AS severity,
    'RECALL_CASCADE' AS event_type
  FROM enriched
  WHERE signal_type IN (
    'recall','safety_signal','safety',
    'adverse_event','fda_action','market_withdrawal'
  )
    AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
    AND entity_key NOT LIKE 'DOMAIN:%'
  GROUP BY entity_key
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT signal_type) >= 2
),

competitive_surge AS (
  SELECT
    indication,
    COUNT(*) AS hit_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(drug_name), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(entity_name), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(sponsor), '')
    )) AS competitor_count,
    array_agg(DISTINCT COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(drug_name), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(entity_name), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(sponsor), ''),
      'unknown'
    )) AS competitors,
    array_agg(DISTINCT signal_domain) AS domains,
    MAX(impact_score) AS peak_impact,
    ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_impact,
    MAX(last_seen_at) AS latest_signal_at,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(*) >= 10 THEN 'SURGE'
      WHEN COUNT(*) >= 5 THEN 'ELEVATED'
      ELSE 'WATCH'
    END AS intensity,
    'COMPETITIVE_SURGE' AS event_type
  FROM enriched
  WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE
    AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    AND indication IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(indication) <> ''
  GROUP BY indication
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),

ghost_cluster AS (
  SELECT
    signal_domain,
    signal_type,
    COUNT(*) AS cluster_size,
    ROUND(AVG(impact_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_impact,
    MAX(impact_score) AS peak_impact,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_urgent = TRUE) AS urgent_count,
    MIN(last_seen_at) AS window_start,
    MAX(last_seen_at) AS window_end,
    array_agg(source_id ORDER BY impact_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS source_ids,
    array_agg(id ORDER BY impact_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS signal_ids,
    'GHOST_CLUSTER' AS event_type
  FROM enriched
  WHERE (asset_id IS NULL OR TRIM(asset_id) = '')
    AND (drug_name IS NULL OR TRIM(drug_name) = '')
    AND (entity_name IS NULL OR TRIM(entity_name) = '')
    AND impact_score >= 6
    AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  GROUP BY signal_domain, signal_type
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),

pipeline_acceleration AS (
  SELECT
    entity_key,
    COALESCE(
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(asset_id), '')),
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(drug_name), '')),
      MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(entity_name), ''))
    ) AS pipeline_entity,
    MIN(match_tier) AS best_match_tier,
    array_agg(DISTINCT phase) FILTER (WHERE phase IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phase) <> '') AS phases_observed,
    array_agg(DISTINCT status) FILTER (WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(status) <> '') AS statuses,
    COUNT(DISTINCT nct_id) FILTER (WHERE nct_id IS NOT NULL) AS trial_count,
    COUNT(*) AS signal_count,
    MAX(impact_score) AS peak_impact,
    MAX(last_seen_at) AS latest_signal_at,
    'PIPELINE_ACCELERATION' AS event_type
  FROM enriched
  WHERE signal_domain IN ('ct_gov','clinical_trial','pipeline','regulatory','ema','fda_approval')
    AND entity_key NOT LIKE 'DOMAIN:%'
    AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  GROUP BY entity_key
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
     AND (
       COUNT(DISTINCT NULLIF(TRIM(phase), '')) >= 2
       OR COUNT(DISTINCT nct_id) FILTER (WHERE nct_id IS NOT NULL) >= 2
     )
)

SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t) ORDER BY t.total_richness DESC, t.peak_impact DESC) FROM triple_threat t) AS triple_threats,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(r) ORDER BY CASE r.severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, r.peak_impact DESC) FROM recall_cascade r) AS recall_cascades,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(c) ORDER BY c.hit_count DESC, c.peak_impact DESC) FROM competitive_surge c) AS competitive_surges,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(g) ORDER BY g.urgent_count DESC, g.avg_impact DESC) FROM ghost_cluster g) AS ghost_clusters,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(p) ORDER BY p.signal_count DESC, p.peak_impact DESC) FROM pipeline_acceleration p) AS pipeline_accelerations,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
      SELECT 1 FROM triple_threat
      UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM recall_cascade
      UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM competitive_surge
      UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM ghost_cluster
      UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM pipeline_acceleration
    ) x
  ) AS total_compound_events;
